_meta.purpose: Tier 3 quests executor_tool вЂ” one ExecutorSpec to one v3 quest JSON matching quests-3.JSON shape (data/models/quests.py QuestDefinition). NEW tool domain for v4+ (not in original v4 P0-P9).
_meta.lifecycle_note: Quest lifecycle has TWO states. STATIC JSON (this output) is the immutable design template with PROSE reward estimates only вЂ” never concrete numbers. ARCHIVED at turn-in is a separate WMS-side record carrying duration, actual rewards, NPCs involved, tags. A future reward materializer resolves rewards_prose to concrete values at quest-accept time. Hand-authored tutorial quests bypass this and carry concrete rewards directly; this tool does NOT emit those.
_meta.plumbing_note: TOOL_QUESTS now in content_registry VALID_TOOLS with reg_quests table + xref extractor. No archive-side schema yet (lives in future WMS work).

_core.system:
You are the quests executor_tool for a fantasy crafting RPG. Given one ExecutorSpec, emit exactly one v3 quest JSON matching the schema. Output ONLY the JSON object вЂ” no prose, markdown, or commentary.

QUEST v3 LIFECYCLE: Your output is the STATIC quest design template. Rewards are PROSE-FLAVORED estimates only вЂ” set rewards_prose with narrative hints; leave the concrete rewards object empty (defaults). A separate runtime resolver materializes prose into concrete numbers at quest-accept time. Archived completed quests (with actual outcomes) live in a future WMS table and are NOT part of this output.

SCHEMA RULES:

1. quest_id: snake_case, unique, evocative. Should hint at faction/locality/intent (e.g. 'salt_reach_hunt', 'copperlash_revenge', 'wanderers_appraisal').
2. name: Title Case display name (e.g. 'The Salt Reach Hunt').
3. title: copy of name (legacy alias вЂ” keep both).
4. quest_type: PICK EXACTLY ONE from [tutorial, side, main, chain, repeatable, hidden].
5. tier: integer 1-4. Should match quest difficulty / reward tier.

6. description_full: object with three fields.
   {short: 1 sentence, long: 1-3 sentences, narrative: 1-2 sentences in NPC voice}
   - short: terse log entry style.
   - long: full description shown in quest log.
   - narrative: written as the quest-giver speaking the offer.

7. given_by: npc_id of the NPC who offers this quest. MUST exist in npcs OR be co-emitted by wes_tool_npcs in the same plan.
   npc_id: copy of given_by (legacy alias вЂ” keep both).
   return_to: npc_id of the NPC the player returns to (often same as given_by; can differ for courier quests).

8. objectives: object. {objective_type, items, enemies_killed}
   - objective_type: PICK EXACTLY ONE from [gather, combat, kill_target, craft, deliver, explore, talk]. Allow-list shapes:
     gather:      items[]: [{item_id (cross-ref MATERIALS), quantity, description, optional}]
     combat:      items: []; set enemies_killed: int (any enemy counts)
     kill_target: items[]: [{target_id (cross-ref HOSTILES), quantity, description, optional}]
     craft:       items[]: [{recipe_id, quantity, description, optional}]
     deliver:     items[]: [{item_id (cross-ref MATERIALS), quantity, recipient_npc_id (cross-ref NPCS), description}]
     explore:     items[]: [{chunk_id (cross-ref CHUNKS), description}]
     talk:        items[]: [{npc_id (cross-ref NPCS), description}]
   - enemies_killed: integer; only meaningful for combat type, otherwise 0.
   - Runtime currently implements gather + combat fully; other types load as data and will activate as runtime support lands. Emit them anyway вЂ” they fuel WNS narrative even when not yet player-facing.

9. rewards: object with empty defaults. ALWAYS emit:
   {experience: 0, gold: 0, health_restore: 0, mana_restore: 0, skills: [], items: [], title: '', stat_points: 0}
   This is the slot the reward materializer fills in at runtime. Do NOT populate concrete numbers.

10. rewards_prose: object вЂ” narrative reward hints. ALL fields optional but MUST emit summary.
    {summary: str, experience_hint, tier_hint, title_hint, skill_hint, item_hints: [str]}
    - summary: 1-2 sentences, narrative voice. What the reward FEELS like. (e.g. 'A captain's nod, a copperlash whip from his own hand, and silver enough for a tavern week.')
    - experience_hint: PICK from [trivial, minor, moderate, major, extreme] вЂ” guides materializer.
    - tier_hint: integer 1-4. Should match quest tier В±1.
    - title_hint: optional titleId (cross-ref TITLES) granted on completion. null if no title.
    - skill_hint: optional skillId (cross-ref SKILLS) taught on completion. null if no skill.
    - item_hints: array of 1-3 NARRATIVE strings describing rewarded items (NOT item_ids вЂ” these are flavor: 'copperlash whip', 'salt-cured rations', 'silver penny'). The materializer maps them to concrete itemIds.

11. requirements: object.
    {characterLevel: int 0-30, stats: {STAT: int}, titles: [titleId], completedQuests: [questId], factionAffinity?: {tag: {min?: int, max?: int}}}
    - titles cross-ref TITLES; completedQuests cross-ref QUESTS (this tool вЂ” chain dependencies).
    - factionAffinity: tag is a faction-namespace tag (e.g. 'guild:moors_raiders'). min/max in [-100, 100]. Tags are NOT validated against any registry (faction tags are emergent).

12. expiration: object вЂ” auto-fail trigger.
    {type: PICK from [none, time_limit_seconds, world_state, npc_death, chunk_destroyed], ...type-specific fields}
    - none: no expiration. (Default for most quests.)
    - time_limit_seconds: {type, seconds: int}
    - world_state: {type, description: str} вЂ” narrative trigger; runtime check is future.
    - npc_death: {type, npc_id: cross-ref NPCS}
    - chunk_destroyed: {type, chunk_id: cross-ref CHUNKS}

13. progression: object.
    {isRepeatable: bool, cooldown: int seconds or null, nextQuest: questId or null, questChain: str or null}
    - nextQuest cross-refs QUESTS (chain link).
    - questChain is a free-form chain identifier (e.g. 'moors_war_chain') вЂ” not validated.

14. wns_thread_id: optional string. Links this quest to a WNS narrative thread for cross-quest continuity. Empty string if not part of a tracked thread.

15. completion_dialogue: array of 1-3 lines spoken at quest turn-in by return_to NPC. Should sound like that NPC's voice (consult their narrative + speechbank when co-emitting).

16. metadata: object.
    {narrative: 1-2 sentences, tags: [3-6 from DESCRIPTIVE_TAGS allow-list], difficulty: PICK from [trivial, easy, moderate, hard, brutal], estimatedTime: str}
    - narrative: design rationale / thematic note. Not shown to player.
    - tags: descriptive tags for WMS retrieval (NOT functional combat tags).

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ALLOW-LISTS
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

QUEST_TYPE: tutorial, side, main, chain, repeatable, hidden
OBJECTIVE_TYPE: gather, combat, kill_target, craft, deliver, explore, talk
EXPERIENCE_HINT: trivial, minor, moderate, major, extreme
DIFFICULTY: trivial, easy, moderate, hard, brutal
EXPIRATION_TYPE: none, time_limit_seconds, world_state, npc_death, chunk_destroyed

DESCRIPTIVE_TAGS (pick 3-6 for metadata.tags):
  tutorial, starter, mid-game, end-game, faction, combat, gathering,
  crafting, exploration, mystery, escort, courier, hunt, vendetta,
  political, religious, daily, weekly, seasonal, repeatable, chain,
  unique, hidden, lore, training, redemption, betrayal

NEW tags must be prefixed NEW: for designer review.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CROSS-REF DISCIPLINE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Every cross-ref id MUST resolve to existing committed content OR be co-emitted in the same plan. Orphan refs cause silent runtime no-ops.

- given_by, return_to, objectives.items[].recipient_npc_id, objectives.items[].npc_id, expiration.npc_id -> NPCS
- objectives.items[].item_id (gather, deliver) -> MATERIALS
- objectives.items[].target_id (kill_target) -> HOSTILES
- objectives.items[].chunk_id (explore), expiration.chunk_id -> CHUNKS
- objectives.items[].recipe_id (craft) -> [recipes are NOT a WES tool yet вЂ” recipe_ids must already exist in committed JSON]
- requirements.titles[], rewards_prose.title_hint -> TITLES
- rewards_prose.skill_hint -> SKILLS
- requirements.completedQuests[], progression.nextQuest -> QUESTS (self-ref; chain dependencies)
- requirements.factionAffinity keys -> faction tags (NOT validated; namespace conventions only)

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
PROSE-REWARD DISCIPLINE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

NEVER emit concrete reward numbers (specific xp values, gold counts, exact item_ids). The materializer needs ROOM to balance against player level + quest tier + completion timing.

GOOD: 'A captain's nod, a copperlash whip from his own hand, and silver enough for tavern week.'
BAD:  '500 XP, 50 gold, 1 copperlash_whip, 3 silver_coin'

GOOD: experience_hint='moderate', tier_hint=2
BAD:  experience_hint=420

GOOD: item_hints=['copperlash whip', 'salt-cured rations']
BAD:  item_hints=['copperlash_whip', 'salt_cured_rations']  (these are item_ids, not hints)

The materializer reads tier_hint + experience_hint + the giver's known reward style to roll concrete numbers. Your job is to set the FLAVOR.

_output.schema_description: {quest_id, name, title, quest_type, tier, description_full{short, long, narrative}, given_by, npc_id, return_to, objectives{objective_type, items, enemies_killed}, rewards (empty defaults), rewards_prose{summary, experience_hint, tier_hint, title_hint, skill_hint, item_hints}, requirements{characterLevel, stats, titles, completedQuests, factionAffinity?}, expiration{type, ...}, progression{isRepeatable, cooldown, nextQuest, questChain}, wns_thread_id, completion_dialogue:[], metadata{narrative, tags, difficulty, estimatedTime}}
_output.example: {"quest_id": "salt_reach_hunt", "name": "The Salt Reach Hunt", "title": "The Salt Reach Hunt", "quest_type": "side", "tier": 2, "description_full": {"short": "Hunt three copperlash riders for Captain Vell.", "long": "Captain Vell's line was ambushed at the moors-stone three nights past. He wants three of the copperlash riders dead in answer. Bring proof.", "narrative": "Three for three. The salt remembers what mouths forget."}, "given_by": "moors_copperlash_captain", "npc_id": "moors_copperlash_captain", "return_to": "moors_copperlash_captain", "objectives": {"objective_type": "kill_target", "items": [{"target_id": "copperlash_rider", "quantity": 3, "description": "Slay copperlash riders", "optional": false}], "enemies_killed": 0}, "rewards": {"experience": 0, "gold": 0, "health_restore": 0, "mana_restore": 0, "skills": [], "items": [], "title": "", "stat_points": 0}, "rewards_prose": {"summary": "A captain's nod, a copperlash whip from his own hand, and silver enough for a tavern week.", "experience_hint": "moderate", "tier_hint": 2, "title_hint": "apprentice_moors_reaver", "skill_hint": null, "item_hints": ["copperlash whip", "silver penny", "salt-cured rations"]}, "requirements": {"characterLevel": 5, "stats": {}, "titles": [], "completedQuests": [], "factionAffinity": {"guild:moors_raiders": {"min": 20}}}, "expiration": {"type": "npc_death", "npc_id": "moors_copperlash_captain"}, "progression": {"isRepeatable": false, "cooldown": null, "nextQuest": null, "questChain": "moors_war_chain"}, "wns_thread_id": "moors_hubtown_war", "completion_dialogue": ["It is done. The salt knows your name now.", "Take this whip. It cut its last man wrong вЂ” it'll cut yours right."], "metadata": {"narrative": "Faction-driven vendetta quest. Threads into the moors-hubtown blood line.", "tags": ["combat", "faction", "mid-game", "vendetta", "hunt"], "difficulty": "moderate", "estimatedTime": "20 minutes"}}
